title: Peluchian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:CelisMot-Outerspace.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Celis Mott with eyebrows done in the Peluchian style]]
'''Peluchian''' was a style of personal grooming<ref name="Otherspace">[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]</ref> originating from the [[Peluchia system/Legends|Peluchia system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref><ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=the [[Peluchian]]|system=Peluchia [[Star system/Legends|system]]|legends=1}}</ref> 
The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Celis Mott]] trimmed and dyed his [[hair|eyebrows]] in the Peluchian style.<ref name="Otherspace" />

==Appearances==
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]
